channel.title: Orthodox Christian Music from the choir of St Nicholas, McKinney Texas
channel.description: Orthodox Christian Music from the choir of St Nicholas, McKinney Texas

item.title: Feasts Of The Lord Nativity, 2013
item.description: Music:Feasts Of The Lord Nativity. Kontakion Tone 3, "today the Virgin", Nativity Vigil, St Nicholas Orthodox Church, 01/06/2013
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: Music:Feasts Of The Lord Nativity. Kontakion Tone 3, "today the Virgin", Nativity Vigil, St Nicholas Orthodox Church, 01/06/2013

item.title: Feasts Of The Lord Nativity, 2013
item.description: Music:Feasts Of The Lord Nativity. Troparion, Tone 4, "Thy Nativity", and the blessing of the loaves at Litia, Nativity Vigil, sung at St Nicholas Orthodox Church, 01/06/2013
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: Music:Feasts Of The Lord Nativity. Troparion, Tone 4, "Thy Nativity", and the blessing of the loaves at Litia, Nativity Vigil, sung at St Nicholas Orthodox Church, 01/06/2013

item.title: Feasts Of The Lord Nativity, 2013
item.description: Music:Feasts Of The Lord Nativity. Troparion, Tone 4, "Thy Nativity", in English/Slavonic/English, Nativity Vigil, sung after "God is the Lord" St Nicholas Orthodox Church, 01/06/2013
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: Music:Feasts Of The Lord Nativity. Troparion, Tone 4, "Thy Nativity", in English/Slavonic/English, Nativity Vigil, sung after "God is the Lord" St Nicholas Orthodox Church, 01/06/2013

item.title: Feasts Of The Lord Nativity, 2013
item.description: Music:Feasts Of The Lord Nativity. Litia, "Blessed be the name of the Lord", Nativity Vigil, St Nicholas Orthodox Church, 01/06/2013
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: Music:Feasts Of The Lord Nativity. Litia, "Blessed be the name of the Lord", Nativity Vigil, St Nicholas Orthodox Church, 01/06/2013

item.title: Feasts Of The Lord Nativity, 2013
item.description: Music:Feasts Of The Lord Nativity. Polyeleos and Meglynarion, Nativity Vigil, St Nicholas Orthodox Church, 01/06/2013
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: Music:Feasts Of The Lord Nativity. Polyeleos and Meglynarion, Nativity Vigil, St Nicholas Orthodox Church, 01/06/2013

item.title: Great Lent Sunday Before Great Lent 02, Publican And Pharisee, Lord I Have Cried, 2012
item.description: Music:Great Lent Sunday Before Great Lent 02. Our choir sings the 3 stichera from the Triodion for the Publican & Pharisee (and an infant occasionally provides a little commentary!) The refrains are intoned by an 8 year old child. We do this often, for those children who want to learn to sing.
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: Music:Great Lent Sunday Before Great Lent 02. Our choir sings the 3 stichera from the Triodion for the Publican & Pharisee (and an infant occasionally provides a little commentary!) The refrains are intoned by an 8 year old child. We do this often, for those children who want to learn to sing.

item.title: O Joyous Light, from Vespers, sung by Sophie (4 y/o)
item.description: O Joyous Light, from Vespers, sung by Sophie (4 y/o)
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: O Joyous Light, from Vespers, sung by Sophie (4 y/o)

item.title: Misc, My Hope Is The Father, By Sophie, 2008
item.description: Music:Misc, My Hope Is The Father, By Sophie, 2008
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: Music:Misc, My Hope Is The Father, By Sophie, 2008
